emotional_tone: Cyber-Brutalist, technical, elite, intense, raw, competitive

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-['Anton'] uppercase tracking-tight text-white leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-['Anton'] uppercase tracking-tight text-white
hierarchy.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-['Anton'] uppercase tracking-normal text-white
hierarchy.kicker: text-xs md:text-sm font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#00FFFF]

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol - Mode B (Control Room Grid) adapted for Cyber-Brutalist sections. Use harsh, visible borders (border-collapse style) and zero-gap brutalist blocks where appropriate.

navbar.style: Fixed, border-b border-white/10, bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md, z-50
navbar.logo: font-['Anton'] text-2xl tracking-widest uppercase. 'ARENA' in #FFFFFF, 'KORE' in #00FFFF
navbar.cta: bg-transparent border border-[#00FFFF] text-[#00FFFF] hover:bg-[#00FFFF] hover:text-black transition-colors rounded-[14px] px-6 py-2 font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] uppercase text-sm

hero.background: Fullscreen image with absolute inset-0 overlay bg-[rgba(0,0,0,0.7)]
hero.content_alignment: Flex column, centered or left-aligned with brutalist massive typography
hero.badge: Inline-flex, border border-[#00FFFF] text-[#00FFFF] px-3 py-1 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] mb-6
hero.primary_cta: bg-[#00FFFF] text-black font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] uppercase font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-[14px] hover:bg-white transition-colors
hero.secondary_cta: bg-transparent border border-[#FFD700] text-[#FFD700] font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] uppercase font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-[14px] hover:bg-[#FFD700] hover:text-black transition-colors

kore_id_section.style: Raw brutalist layout. Large typography intersecting with tech data.

sistema_nexus_section.style: 4-column cyber grid. Cards have flat OLED Black background with neon cyan top borders.
sistema_nexus_section.card_style: border border-white/10 p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-[#00FFFF]/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

arena_competitiva_section.style: High-contrast dark section with gold (#FFD700) accents.
arena_competitiva_section.stats: Massive numbers in 'Anton' font, glowing gold.
arena_competitiva_section.background: Dark sports action image with low opacity

footer.style: Minimalist tech footer. border-t border-white/10 pt-12 pb-8
footer.logo_massive: text-[10vw] font-['Anton'] text-white/5 leading-none select-none overflow-hidden flex

hero_background.description: Wide-angle portrait of a mysterious athletic man wearing a dark hood, deep shadows, cinematic lighting, moody urban night atmosphere

nexus_background.description: Abstract high-tech glowing cyan grid and floating particles over a pitch black background
nexus_background.placement: Sistema NÈXUS section background (low opacity) or card decorative images

arena_background.description: Dramatic silhouette of athletes training in a dark gritty urban environment, illuminated by striking gold and cyan rim lights

motion_and_interactions.buttons: Hovering buttons should have a slight scale up (scale-105) and an aggressive box-shadow glow matching their color (cyan or gold).
motion_and_interactions.cards: Hovering over NÈXUS cards should reveal a subtle cyan radial gradient background tracking the mouse, or simply highlight the border in solid cyan.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling. Sections fade-in with raw, unpolished translation (e.g., straight up from 20px, no soft blur).

instructions_to_main_agent: NO REACT. This is a standalone HTML5 project.

Configure Tailwind in the head: <script>tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: { cyan: '#00FFFF', gold: '#FFD700' }, fontFamily: { anton: ['Anton', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['IBM Plex Mono', 'monospace'] } } } }</script>
Import Google Fonts: Anton (weights 400) and IBM Plex Mono (weights 400, 600).
Use Lucide icons via CDN: <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script> and initialize them.
Strictly apply `rounded-[14px]` to all buttons as requested. Leave standard container borders sharp (rounded-none) for the brutalist feel.
Ensure the hero overlay is EXACTLY `bg-[rgba(0,0,0,0.7)]` over the hooded founder image.
Texts MUST be in Italian as provided in the problem statement.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, links, nav items) using kebab-case role-based names.
